title: 14-Piece School Stationery Set with Calculator, Scissors, Pens and Pencils, Reusable Pouch
features: COMPLETE SET: 14-piece stationery kit includes calculator, scissors, pencils, pens and other essential school and office supplies in a convenient reusable pouch
CALCULATOR FEATURES: Compact electronic calculator with large LCD display, basic mathematical functions and memory capability for quick calculations
WRITING TOOLS: Multiple writing implements including pencils and pens in different colours for versatile note-taking and drawing needs
STORAGE SOLUTION: Clear plastic carrying pouch keeps all items organised and visible, perfect for school, office, or travel use
SCISSORS INCLUDED: Durable scissors with comfortable blue handles suitable for precise cutting of paper and other common materials
description: 14-Piece Stationery Set – Perfect for School, Office & Home Stay organized and prepared with this comprehensive 14-piece stationery set, packed with all the essentials for school, work, or home use. Designed for convenience, each item is neatly stored in a durable, reusable pouch, making it easy to carry and keep your supplies in one place. What’s Inside? ✔ 3 Pencil Top Erasers – Assorted colors for easy corrections ✔ 2 HB Pencils – Smooth writing experience ✔ 2 Ballpoint Pens (Blue & Black) – Reliable and versatile ✔ 1 Sharpener – Keep your pencils sharp at all times ✔ 1 6" Ruler – Perfect for precise measurements ✔ 1 Set Square & Protractor – Ideal for geometry and technical drawing ✔ 1 Pair of Scissors – Sturdy design with comfortable handles ✔ 1 Calculator – Large display for quick calculations Why Choose This Set? ✅ All-in-One Solution – Everything you need for writing, drawing, and calculations ✅ Perfect for Students & Professionals – Great for school, office, or home use ✅ Convenient & Portable – Comes in a reusable pouch for easy storage ✅ Great Value – A cost-effective bundle of high-quality stationery essentials Whether you're preparing for exams, working on office tasks, or handling everyday writing needs, this 14-piece stationery set is the ultimate companion to keep you organized and efficient. Get yours today!
